transcription.text: Uh, Mr. Bo, how do you find New York as compared to Hollywood? Well, I just love New York, and I just love Hollywood. How do you feel about Laura Leslie getting the Oscar? I just love Laura. What about you and Bo Jester? Oh, we're just good friends. Mr. Bo, you have the most beautiful legs in the world. Yes, and I never wear anything but cheesecake. Cheesecake? They are these very beautiful sheer nylons cameo legs. The ones with the marvy fluted top. Mr. Bo, do you... Cheesecake is like a silken veil caressing my very own beautiful legs. Well, it wouldn't be fair to my public to have the teeniest wrinkle or bag anywhere ever. Just one more picture, Mr. Bo. Cheesecake. Cheesecake nylons.
